name: Mini Sausage Rubens
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice sausage into 1/4 inch pieces.
2. Drain the saurkraut.
3. Cut cheese slices into 1/2" x 2-1/2" strips.
4. Melt butter in a small skillet.
5. Brush both sides of the rye bread with melted butter.
6. Place the buttered bread on a baking sheet.
7. Toast at 400 degrees for 5 minutes, then turn and toast for another 5 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and build the rubens, ending with criss-crossed cheese slices on top.
9. Bake for an additional 5-10 minutes or until the cheese is bubbly.
